name: ocak
description: Ocak session tracking hooks for Claude Code

hooks.command: bash -c '[ -z "$OCAK_SESSION_ID" ] && exit 0; INPUT=$(cat); BODY=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load(sys.stdin); data[\"ocak_session_id\"] = \"$OCAK_SESSION_ID\"; print(json.dumps(data))"); curl -sf -X POST http://localhost:27832/hook -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "$BODY" || true'
